cms.task_text: Kód má nakreslit [hlp]čtverec o straně 80 bodů[/hlp], ale obsahuje chybu — úhel otočení je špatný. Najděte a opravte chybu tak, aby čtverec měl správné rohy (90°).
cms.start_blocks_xml:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml">
  <block type="turtle_forward" x="20" y="20">
    <field name="DISTANCE">80</field>
    <next>
      <block type="turtle_right">
        <field name="ANGLE">45</field>
        <next>
          <block type="turtle_forward">
            <field name="DISTANCE">80</field>
            <next>
              <block type="turtle_right">
                <field name="ANGLE">45</field>
                <next>
                  <block type="turtle_forward">
                    <field name="DISTANCE">80</field>
                    <next>
                      <block type="turtle_right">
                        <field name="ANGLE">45</field>
                        <next>
                          <block type="turtle_forward">
                            <field name="DISTANCE">80</field>
                          </block>
                        </next>
                      </block>
                    </next>
                  </block>
                </next>
              </block>
            </next>
          </block>
        </next>
      </block>
    </next>
  </block>
</xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml">
  <block type="turtle_forward" x="20" y="20">
    <field name="DISTANCE">80</field>
    <next>
      <block type="turtle_right">
        <field name="ANGLE">90</field>
        <next>
          <block type="turtle_forward">
            <field name="DISTANCE">80</field>
            <next>
              <block type="turtle_right">
                <field name="ANGLE">90</field>
                <next>
                  <block type="turtle_forward">
                    <field name="DISTANCE">80</field>
                    <next>
                      <block type="turtle_right">
                        <field name="ANGLE">90</field>
                        <next>
                          <block type="turtle_forward">
                            <field name="DISTANCE">80</field>
                          </block>
                        </next>
                      </block>
                    </next>
                  </block>
                </next>
              </block>
            </next>
          </block>
        </next>
      </block>
    </next>
  </block>
</xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
